sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login, log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!, then click Logout and confirm you are returned to the login page

success_condition.value: You logged out of the secure area

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Enter username and password, then click the login button.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a text input with ID 'username' is visible
If a text input with ID 'password' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the text input with ID 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the text input with ID 'password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Secure Area Page
workflow.description: Confirm successful login and then click the logout button.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
If text 'Welcome to the Secure Area.' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Logout'

workflow.name: Returned to Login Page After Logout
workflow.description: Confirm that the logout action successfully returned to the login page.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If text 'You logged out of the secure area!' is visible
actions: Terminate: Successfully logged in, logged out, and confirmed return to login page
workflow.end_state: Logged in, logged out, and confirmed return to login page

attempts.success_detail: page text contains 'You logged out of the secure area'? False  (url='https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login')
page text contains 'You logged out of the secure area'? True  (url='https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login')

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls, click the Remove button to remove the checkbox, and wait for confirmation that it is gone

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls

workflow.name: On Dynamic Controls Page
workflow.description: Identify the dynamic controls page and initiate checkbox removal.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Remove' is visible
If a checkbox with id 'checkbox' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Remove'

workflow.name: Checkbox Removed Confirmation
workflow.description: Confirm that the checkbox has been removed and the confirmation message is displayed.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Add' is visible
If a div with id 'message' contains the text 'It's gone!'
If a checkbox with id 'checkbox' is NOT visible
actions: Terminate: Checkbox successfully removed and confirmed.

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/add_remove_elements/, click 'Add Element', and confirm a Delete button appears

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/add_remove_elements/

workflow.name: On Add/Remove Elements Page
workflow.description: Click the 'Add Element' button to create a new element.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/add_remove_elements/
If a button with text 'Add Element' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Add Element'

workflow.name: Delete Button Appeared
workflow.description: Verify that a 'Delete' button is now visible on the page.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/add_remove_elements/
If a button with text 'Delete' is visible
actions: Terminate: Delete button confirmed

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/hovers, hover over the first user's image to reveal their profile link, then click it and confirm you land on their profile page

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/hovers

workflow.name: On Hovers Page
workflow.description: Hover over the first user's image to reveal their profile link, then click it.
triggers: If the current URL is https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/hovers
If an h3 element with text 'Hovers' is visible
actions: Hover over the first image with alt text 'User Avatar'
Click the link with text 'View profile'

workflow.name: On Profile Page
workflow.description: Confirm that the navigation landed on the user's profile page.
triggers: If the current URL contains /users/
If an h1 element with text 'Not Found' is NOT visible
actions: Terminate: Successfully landed on the user's profile page.

sentence: go to automationexercise.com, search for 'dress', add the first result to your cart, then view the cart

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://automationexercise.com/

workflow.name: On Automation Exercise Homepage
workflow.description: Search for 'dress' using the site's search bar.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Search Products' is visible
actions: Type 'dress' into the input field with placeholder 'Search Products'
Click the button with text 'Search'

workflow.name: On Search Results Page
workflow.description: Add the first product from the search results to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/products
If a heading with text 'SEARCHED PRODUCTS' is visible
actions: Click the 'Add to cart' button for the first product shown

workflow.name: Product Added Confirmation
workflow.description: Confirm the product was added and proceed to view the cart.
triggers: If a modal dialog with text 'Your product has been added to cart!' is visible
If a button with text 'View Cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'View Cart'

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Verify that the cart page is displayed with the added product.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/view_cart
If a heading with text 'Shopping Cart' is visible
actions: Terminate: The cart page is displayed with the added product.
